reviews.review_title: Good game and I can help make better.
reviews.review_description: I love it.and the built in mods that are platforms an long arms but instead of broken long arms where when you move in real life your body moves but not your head.also I would make a great modderator.i follow code of conduct and I would never ever ban or kick people for fun.also being a mod I could add and fix stuff that when fixed or added could make the game more popular.i have a lot of friends with Meta quests and I could tell them about it.thank you if you or y'all spent yalls time which you did not have to spend reading this🙏❤️‍🔥🙉
I met the developer in big scary and he said he would give me admin im still waiting for that

reviews.review_title: I am getting bullied or not getting

reviews.review_description: Pepole were toxic so can I have moderator

developer_response.body:
Hi, I understand that people can be toxic, and this game has a discord. so if you want, create a ticket in the discord. 
https://discord.gg/Qt8ctaMdPR other than that, yes, you may have moderator, send me a dm with your username in-game.

reviews.review_description: I play your game every day NOT JOKING I swear bro please 🙏.    The game is fun 🤩 I like it you done a nice job 👍🏻
